description: Least-privilege workflow contract. Every key in this file is enforced by check-workflow-permissions.mjs, which parses the workflow with the deterministic YAML subset parser instead of matching lines.

exceptions.reason: outside the CP1-A.2 allowed_paths as well; still OPEN and still tracked as repository prerequisite P7 in docs/control-plane/REPOSITORY_PREREQUISITES.md. CP1-A.2 deliberately did not touch core-ci.yml, so this exception is re-targeted rather than closed, and it stays printed at every run.

action_pinning.note: Mutable tags such as @v4 are rejected. Every exception is printed at runtime so it can never be a silent allowance.

forbidden_run_patterns.why: a workflow must never create a commit
a workflow must never create a tag
a workflow must never mutate refs
a workflow must never drive a pull request
a workflow must never release or reconfigure the repository
a workflow must never call a mutating GitHub API
a workflow must never merge or mutate refs through the API
a workflow must never call the GitHub API directly with curl or wget
a workflow must never publish a package

forbidden_action_patterns.why: commits or pushes on behalf of the workflow
commits on behalf of the workflow
commits on behalf of the workflow
opens pull requests on behalf of the workflow

forbidden_secret_usage.note: check-workflow-permissions.mjs rejects any ${{ secrets.* }} reference in a tracked workflow.
